prompt: Create a shippable desktop campus activities screen for 可行 CampusOps. Keep the exact persistent shell: 248px white left navigation with green 行 logo and 可行 CampusOps, nav 首页 可行 知享 队伍 执行 我的; 首页 selected; compact white top bar 机会工作台 with calendar and avatar 张同学. Main content uses underline tabs 比赛组队 and 校园活动 with 校园活动 active. Show a dense neutral list of four public campus events: 鸿蒙开发者校园工作坊, 校园开源周, 创新项目展示日, 创业实践课程. Columns: 活动与组织, 参与岗位, 时间地点, 公开要求, 当前状态, 操作. Add a narrow right rail 本周安排 with dates and responsible teacher. Primary command 发布活动信息. Blue links expose original notices and emerald actions say 查看详情.
style: Same CampusOps production design system: #F3F5F4 canvas, white surfaces, #171C1A text, #087443 primary, #175CD3 evidence links, thin #D7DDDA rules, compact Chinese sans-serif, 4-6px radii.
composition: Straight-on 16:9 desktop application screenshot, dense table/list and narrow action rail, strong alignment and restrained whitespace.
constraints: Keep all Chinese labels readable; benign campus productivity interface only; no gradients, purple, decorative blobs, marketing hero, card grid, nested cards, excessive pills, device frame, perspective, watermark, or filler gibberish.
